title: hi kaitlyn! I believe you didn’t mean any harm by this video. As a fellow Asian person from Irvine, I totally get the privilege being rai...
body: hi kaitlyn! I believe you didn’t mean any harm by this video. As a fellow Asian person from Irvine, I totally get the privilege being raised in a comfortable environment like Irvine and peers taking that for granted. Kids from irvine are spoiled af they talk like their mom’s money isn’t paying for their education. Though, it is important to know the reason why irvine is the way it is: ethnic and economic discrimination. Irvine tries to price out other minorities with steep housing costs, and it’s a well known fact that irvine is homelessness-free because the unhoused are displaced in neighboring areas like tustin and santa ana. If you want to get into the nitty gritty of it, the reason why we haven’t been affected by the Garden Grove pollutant leak is because companies will specifically place toxic gas tanks in lower-income areas so they won’t affect richer areas (us). It’s heavy to say, but our privilege of living here is built on discrimination against other minorities and the working class. That being said, I know you didn’t mean any harm, but I hope you can understand where some of the comments are coming from!
